doing a job, if an ascetic comes
& tells to do the job, the worker will not agree and refuses to
do. The reason being the when Saturn has combination with
Ketu, Ketu will not allow to do the job i.e. there will be a break
in job.
It is told that ketu means, disputes, breaks etc. When
the transit Saturn transits over natal Ketu the native will have dis-

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 10 1
satisfaction in his job and harassment from higher authorities in
his job. When Ketu conjoins there would be litigations also.
Water does not have any colour and does not have any
shape. when colour is added it changes according to the colour
mixed. Like wise, when Saturn conjoins with different planets,
Saturn conjoins with different planets, Saturn will have influence
as per the planets conjoined with. With this reason, Saturn won't
harm anyone. This is a significant statement.
